channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: NYC Stabbings Near Central Park Investigated as Possible Hate Crimes After Two Men Attacked on Upper West Side
item.description:
A man has been arrested after two separate stabbings near Central Park on Manhattan’s Upper West Side. The NYPD is investigating the attacks as possible hate crimes while examining motive
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/investigation/nyc-upper-west-side-stabbings-central-park-hate-crime-investigation-2026
